summary: Joel Spolsky announces that he has migrated his blog 'Joel on Software' to WordPress. The entire post consists of a single sentence acknowledging the platform change and warning readers about potential bugs. It's a minimal, utilitarian announcement with no substantive discussion.
key_points: Joel migrated his blog to WordPress
He acknowledges the migration may have introduced bugs
money_quotes: I've moved to WordPress. There may be some bugs!
key_insight: A brief housekeeping announcement about a platform migration with no substantive content to analyze.
